message:
feat(cluster): implement CLUSTER subcommand dispatch for INFO, MYID, SLOTS, SHARDS, NODES, KEYSLOT, GETKEYSINSLOT, COUNTKEYSINSLOT, and RESET

Expand the CLUSTER command from a HELP-only scaffold (FR-P2C-007 D1) to
a full subcommand dispatcher covering the essential Redis cluster topology
and diagnostic subcommands.

Runtime:
- Add ClusterSubcommand::Dispatch variant with optimized byte-length
  classification in classify_cluster_subcommand
- Route dispatched subcommands through dispatch_argv with now_ms parameter
- CLUSTER INFO returns cluster_enabled/state/slots/epoch/messages stats
- CLUSTER MYID returns 40-char zero placeholder node ID
- CLUSTER SLOTS/SHARDS/NODES return empty collections (no cluster configured)
- CLUSTER KEYSLOT computes CRC16 hash slot for a given key
- CLUSTER GETKEYSINSLOT/COUNTKEYSINSLOT query keys in a given slot
- CLUSTER RESET returns OK (no-op in single-node mode)
- Update CLUSTER HELP output to list all supported subcommands

Conformance:
- Add 8 new steps to fr_p2c_007_cluster_journey.json exercising each
  subcommand with expected responses
- Update conformance test expected HELP output

Tests:
- Add unit tests for all 9 new subcommands with response validation
- Extend classify_cluster_subcommand benchmark workload with new entries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
